archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) customized to Military Brutalist Terminal

modes.nerv_mode: Full effects, intense dark terminal aesthetic, CRT scanlines, glitch animations, heavy neon. Colors: Black base, Orange/Red/Green accents.
modes.professional_mode: Rebuild Evangelion UI aesthetic. Clean white panels, sharp black typography, minimalist orange accents, reduced motion (prefers-reduced-motion respected). Light theme.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Strict grid hierarchy (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), tight gaps (gap-1 to gap-4). Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none. Sharp edges only. No soft corners.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px or 2px solid borders. NERV Mode uses border-orange-500/50 or border-green-500/50. Professional Mode uses border-zinc-300 or border-black.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense inside terminal blocks (p-2, p-4), generous between major sections (py-24).

surfaces.nerv_mode: Retro-Futurism Terminal. Deep black/indigo background. Neon borders. Repeating-linear-gradient for scanlines. No soft shadows. 1px solid strokes or drop-shadow on text.
surfaces.professional_mode: Swiss & High-Contrast. Flat solid white surfaces, stark black grid lines, pure functional color for alerts.

motion_and_interactions.crt_flicker: Subtle opacity and translate animation on the entire container to simulate CRT refresh.
motion_and_interactions.scanlines: Fixed overlay with pointer-events-none using repeating linear gradient (black and transparent).
motion_and_interactions.boot_sequence: 12-second terminal boot sequence overlay. Typed commands, loading percentages, authorization checks. Persist skip in localStorage.
motion_and_interactions.glitch_effect: CSS clip-path animations on hover for titles and main images.
motion_and_interactions.hexagon_transitions: Used for unlocking NERV Records (Achievements) and page reveals.
motion_and_interactions.custom_cursor: AT-Field custom cursor. Small glowing dot that expands into concentric octagons on click.

components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges. NERV Mode: Black bg, neon border, text color matches border, hover inverts colors. Prof Mode: Black bg, white text, orange hover.
components.cards: Cardless look. Data tables, strict grid borders, hazard striping backgrounds on headers.
components.progress_bars: Segmented blocks instead of smooth fills (Synchronization Ratios).
components.modals: Full-screen or strictly geometric overlays. 'CLASSIFIED' stamps.

audio.toggle: Required CC0 SFX toggle. Use standard open-source terminal beeps and alarms.
audio.events: Hover beeps, boot sequence diagnostic sounds, warning klaxons for Easter Eggs.

easter_eggs.nerv_logo_clicks: 10 clicks on NERV logo triggers 'Third Impact' screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a frontend-only static site. Do not implement a backend.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Extend tailwind.config.js for custom fonts (Noto Serif Display, JetBrains Mono, Anton) and colors (nerv-orange, terminal-green, alert-red).
Implement two distinct visual modes: NERV Mode (dark, heavy animations, CRT effects) and Professional Mode (light, Rebuild-style clean panels, minimal animations). Ensure this toggle is prominent.
Apply the 'Control Room' bento grid protocol for the layout. Avoid standard soft Shadcn cards; make them brutal, sharp-edged, and bordered.
Add a 12s Boot Sequence that sets the tone, but allow skipping and persist skip preference via localStorage.
For the Command Line hidden terminal, create a simple interactive input component that processes hardcoded commands.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex structural grid layouts, but rely on customized Shadcn (sharp edges, no radius) for complex logical components like Dialogs or Tabs.
Integrate Formspree or Web3Forms for the contact form.
